title: rubus infantimontanus
intro: Rubus infantimontanus, also known as Dwarf Raspberry or Alpine Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rubus infantimontanus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties that help protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Rubus infantimontanus can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and overall well-being.
